type: verify implementation + verify tests + verify correctness
title: Independently verify Rust protocol crate, fixtures, schema, and tests

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Independent verification only. Do not trust implementer claims without checking files and running tests.
goals: Inspect whether tests verify behavior through public interfaces.
Confirm examples from the MVP plan validate.
Confirm JSON Schema/protocol docs include versioning and error codes.
Check that implementation is Rust and respects boundaries.
non_goals: Only make small fixups if required to make verification runnable; otherwise report issues for revival.
success_criteria: If verification fails, include concrete file/line issues and spawn/revive a fix task.
If verification passes, mark the protocol artifacts as trusted in the handoff.
